fundamentals.name: State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust

news.title: Iran talks on hold after fighting breaks out and Trump once again threatens annihilation
news.excerpt: Iran says it targeted U.S. military facilities in Kuwait and Bahrain following U.S. strikes on targets in and around the Strait of Hormuz.

news.title: Stock futures rise along with oil prices as traders weigh U.S. attacks on Iran over the weekend: Live updates
news.excerpt: Wall Street is coming off a mixed week, characterized by a rotation out of tech and into other parts of the stock market.

news.title: America can't get enough of protein. The dairy industry can't keep up
news.excerpt: Demand for whey protein is off the charts as American diet trends change and GLP-1s boom, and the dairy industry is struggling to produce enough.

news.title: Thirty-three people rescued, thousands still missing after Venezuela quakes
news.excerpt: Just under 50,000 people were listed as unaccounted for on a website promoted by the country's political opposition on Sunday.

news.title: Some renters say homeownership isn't part of their American Dream: Renting is 'really freeing for me'
news.excerpt: Some no longer see renting as a temporary stop on the path to homeownership but rather a long-term lifestyle choice, reflecting a shift in the American Dream.

news.title: IRAs hold trillions more than 401(k) plans — yet people hardly save in them
news.excerpt: Investors are increasingly rolling money from 401(k) plans to IRAs. Some observers fear they're exposed to poor investment advice.

news.title: If you think China needs to dethrone U.S. dollar, you don't understand how it is waging global currency war
news.excerpt: It's misguided to focus on China's renminbi replacing the U.S. dollar. Beijing is already successfully reducing dependence on a dollar-centric global system.

news.title: Saudi Aramco helicopter crash kills 14 nationals, state news agency says
news.excerpt: Aramco had resumed crude oil loadings on Friday at its Ras Tanura terminal in the Gulf after they were halted for nearly four months.

news.title: These 10 Chinese stocks are powering U.S. data centers
news.excerpt: Many of the top-performing mainland Chinese stocks this year make components used in data centers globally, according to 22V Research.

news.title: Morgan Stanley says salt is the new oil. Here's why and how to play it
news.excerpt: Salt can become as sought-out as oil amid a boom in demand for sodium-ion batteries, according to the firm.

news.title: Seniors in Medicare are about to get landmark obesity drug coverage — but many may not know it yet
news.excerpt: Many seniors may be unaware of the landmark coverage shift starting on July 1, with limited advertising seen from the government or Eli Lilly and Novo.

news.title: A 'perfect storm' points to a much smaller U.S. auto market by 2040
news.excerpt: The auto industry is selling fewer cars--one forecaster says this is a fundamental change, and it is going to get worse.

chatter.excerpt: Configure X API in digital.env to pull live cashtag chatter from FinTwit and finance spaces.

news.title: S&P 500 closes lower as tech stocks slide; SpaceX notches 3-day losing streak: Live updates
news.excerpt: The S&P 500 declined on Monday as tech shares tumbled.

news.title: SpaceX stock tanks 16%, extending slump following post-IPO rally
news.excerpt: A rally following the company's record breaking IPO on June 12 has cooled, with stock dropping the past three days of trading.

news.title: Nvidia's stock struggles as Kalshi traders bet chip prices are coming down
news.excerpt: Shares of Nvidia have been faltering recently — and Kalshi traders predict that what the company can charge for chips is also declining.

news.title: Wall Street was once uber bullish on gold. Now it's changing its tune
news.excerpt: The June Fed meeting set a hawkish tone. Now, several Wall Street firms don't believe gold will live up to their bullish targets.

news.title: Alphabet paces for worst day in a year on AI concerns after high-profile exits
news.excerpt: Google parent Alphabet has seen consecutive high-profile artificial intelligence researchers leave.

news.title: Companies are demanding states cut red tape. Data center-wary voters may think differently
news.excerpt: Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro touted a $20 billion economic development deal last June, the state's largest ever. It's caused Shapiro no shortage of grief.

news.title: Treasury Department authorizes Iranian oil sales through August
news.excerpt: Iranian supertankers have switched on their transponders, after going dark during the war, as they depart the Persian Gulf loaded with oil.

news.title: Senate poised to advance housing bill to limit private equity purchases of single-family homes
news.excerpt: Both chambers of Congress are expected to advance a sprawling housing package this week that's aimed at creating more supply and making homes more affordable.

news.title: Three key AI stocks to watch this week with traders expecting giant moves
news.excerpt: Micron and Cerebras report this week. Also there's heavy options activity in Super Micro.

news.title: Clive Davis, music industry starmaker, has died at 94
news.excerpt: Davis launched or resurrected the careers of superstars such as Janis Joplin, Whitney Houston, Carlos Santana and Alicia Keys.

news.title: SpaceX signs computing power deal with open-source AI startup Reflection worth up to $6.3 billion
news.excerpt: SpaceX has turned its Colossus data center into a commercial computing power platform, landing recent deals with Anthropic, Google and Cursor.

news.title: Alan Greenspan, former chairman of the Fed, dies at age 100
news.excerpt: Alan Greenspan presided over the Federal Reserve for 19 years under four presidents and mastered the art of obfuscation known as Fedspeak.
